## Done

Colorized `pc debug transcript` (and `--all`) in `src/capture.rs`:

- **User turns** ‚Üí whole line **bold bright-yellow** (gutter included) so genuine human prompts pop out of the wall of assistant output ‚Äî per your "definitely highlight those."
- **Assistant turns** ‚Üí dim line-number gutter, **default foreground** body, so the bulk of the transcript stays readable (didn't dim the content itself).
- **Header banner** ‚Üí bold cyan.

Key correctness point: the highlight keys off the per-line `roles` vector that `debug_preprocess_transcript` already returns (previously discarded as `_roles`). I verified in `transcript.rs` that `extract_text` drops `tool_result` blocks and any `<‚Ä¶>` system-reminders/notifications ‚Äî so a "user" line is always a real human turn, never tool noise masquerading as the user role.

Color is **auto**: on only when stdout is a TTY and `NO_COLOR` is unset. Verified:
- Piped/redirected output is **byte-identical** to before (EXTRACT sees the same `{:>4}| line` format).
- TTY shows the colors; `NO_COLOR=1` suppresses them even on a TTY.
- `--all` works.
same thing for extract -- make it colorized in a good way

Piped output has zero ANSI escapes ‚Äî byte-identical to before. Everything verified.

## Done

Colorized `pc debug extract` (and `--all`, which delegates to it) in `src/capture.rs`, reusing the same TTY/`NO_COLOR` auto-detection and the `render_colored_numbered` helper from the transcript work:

- **Header box** (`‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê` borders + ` pc debug extract` title) ‚Üí bold cyan; the `transcript`/`model`/`wiki index` field labels ‚Üí dim so values read clearly.
- **Section dividers** `‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ (N) ‚Ä¶ ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ` (1‚Äì5) ‚Üí bold cyan, so you can jump between SYSTEM PROMPT / USER MESSAGE / RAW RESPONSE / PARSED CLAIMS / SUMMARY at a glance.
- **Section (2) embedded transcript** ‚Üí re-rendered through `render_colored_numbered`, so **user turns get the same bold bright-yellow highlight** there too. The actual `user` string sent to the model is untouched ‚Äî only the display is colorized.
- **Summary counts** ‚Üí admitted in **green**, the explicit/user tally in **bold-yellow** (echoing the transcript's user highlight), dropped in **red** when nonzero / **dim** when zero (so a clean run doesn't flash alarm-red).
- **`‚öÝ` parse-failure warnings** ‚Üí bold red.

Added a small `paint(use_color, code, text)` helper to keep the print sites terse.

Verified: bold-cyan box/dividers, yellow user turns in section 2, and green/yellow/dim summary counts all render under a TTY; piped output has **zero** ANSI escapes (byte-identical to before). Builds clean ‚Äî the only warning is the pre-existing unused `Path` import in `harness/mod.rs`.
